steps.title: Identify the similarity to emphasize
steps.content: Both Judeth Insel and David Davidson share the same role: each contributed musicianship to India Arie's albums. The correct choice must explicitly display this common characteristic.

steps.title: Match the shared role to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice D names both musicians and uses both to emphasize they share the same contribution: lending their talents to India Arie's albums. Choices A and B either focus on one musician or avoid naming them, while Choice C uses a contrast structure to emphasize instrumental differences rather than similarities.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
